devices.name: Indoor Camera 360°
devices.description: Pan-tilt-zoom indoor security camera with 1080p HD video and two-way audio. Perfect for monitoring your home while you're away.

devices.name: Video Doorbell Pro
devices.description: Smart video doorbell with 4K resolution, night vision, and motion detection. Get alerts when packages are delivered or visitors arrive.

devices.name: Outdoor Security Camera 4K
devices.description: Weatherproof outdoor camera with 4K ultra HD resolution, color night vision, and AI-powered motion detection for cars, people, and animals.

devices.name: Floodlight Security Camera
devices.description: Combines a 2K HD security camera with 2000-lumen LED floodlights and a built-in siren. Deters potential intruders and illuminates your property.

devices.name: Motion Sensor
devices.description: Detects movement up to 40 feet away with a 110° field of view. Wireless and battery-powered with a 2-year battery life.

devices.name: Entry Contact Sensor
devices.description: Monitor doors and windows with this wireless magnetic sensor. Instantly alerts you when a door or window is opened.

devices.name: Glass Break Sensor
devices.description: Detects the sound frequency of breaking glass up to 25 feet away. Provides an additional layer of protection for your home.

devices.name: Water Leak Sensor
devices.description: Early detection of water leaks, flooding, or temperature changes. Place near sinks, water heaters, or basement areas.

devices.name: Smoke & CO Detector
devices.description: Smart smoke and carbon monoxide detector with self-testing capabilities. Features a built-in siren and mobile alerts.

devices.name: Panic Button
devices.description: Emergency panic button for medical alerts or security emergencies. Press once for silent alarm or hold for 3 seconds for full emergency response.

plans.name: Basic Monitoring
plans.description: 24/7 professional monitoring with police, fire, and medical dispatch. Includes mobile alerts and remote arming/disarming.

plans.name: Video Recording Plan
plans.description: Store up to 30 days of video history in the cloud. Includes advanced motion detection and video clip sharing.

plans.name: Premium Protection
plans.description: All-in-one plan with professional monitoring, 60-day video storage, smart device integration, and priority emergency response.

plans.name: Self Monitoring
plans.description: Receive push notifications and control your system from anywhere. No professional monitoring fees. Ideal for DIY security.
